Status Score Reason: High concern - ongoing investigation indicates a high potential for risk - though specific findings are not yet determined
Above average concern - an open case implies unresolved issues - suggesting a heightened level of risk
Lower concern - case closure often indicates some resolution - but it doesn’t fully negate the potential for inherent risk
Medium concern - closure with findings suggests that some risk factors were identified - indicating a level of inherent risk
Slightly lower concern than cases closed with findings - but still acknowledges the inherent risk that led to the case being opened
